allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "home: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "home error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/case/honey-bag" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "case: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "case error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/case/honey-bag" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "case: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "case error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "home: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "home error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
